# TinyPivot

> Lightweight data grid with free pivot tables, Pro charts, and optional AI-powered data exploration for Vue 3 and React.

TinyPivot is a batteries-included analytics grid for Vue 3 and React. The free tier includes an Excel-like data grid, pivot tables with Sum aggregation, row/column totals, calculated fields, CSV export, and clipboard support. Pro adds advanced aggregations (Count, Avg, Min, Max, Unique, Median, Std Dev, % of Total), a drag-and-drop Chart Builder (6 chart types), and an AI Data Analyst with natural language queries using your own API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, or OpenRouter). Lifetime license — buy once, no subscription.

## Docs

- [Full AI-friendly developer reference](https://tiny-pivot.com/llms-full.txt): Complete install, quick-start code, all props, free vs Pro feature matrix, pricing, aggregations, theming, and AI Data Analyst setup for both Vue and React
- [Homepage](https://tiny-pivot.com): Live demo, feature overview, and pricing
- [GitHub repository & README](https://github.com/Small-Web-Co/tinypivot): Source code, examples, and AI Analyst demo

## Examples

- [Add a data grid with pivot tables to React](https://tiny-pivot.com/react-data-grid-with-pivot-table): Step-by-step guide for React integration
- [Add a data grid with pivot tables to Vue 3](https://tiny-pivot.com/vue-data-grid-with-pivot-table): Step-by-step guide for Vue 3 integration
- [Embed an AI Data Analyst in a React or Vue app](https://tiny-pivot.com/embedded-ai-data-analyst-component): Natural-language data exploration with BYOK

## Optional

- [TinyPivot vs AG Grid](https://tiny-pivot.com/vs-ag-grid): Side-by-side comparison on size, features, and licensing
- [TinyPivot vs TanStack Table](https://tiny-pivot.com/vs-tanstack-table): Batteries-included analytics grid vs headless table
- [Best React pivot table libraries](https://tiny-pivot.com/best-react-pivot-table-libraries): How to choose the right approach for React
- [Best Vue 3 pivot table components](https://tiny-pivot.com/best-vue-pivot-table-components): How to choose the right approach for Vue 3
- [AG Grid alternatives for React and Vue](https://tiny-pivot.com/ag-grid-alternatives): When to look beyond AG Grid
